member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.AttributeBase
member.summary: The base class that is inherited by all other of our attributes. Do not decorate anything with this attribute!

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.ETagAttribute
member.summary: Marks the property or field as the ETag key for the table.

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute
member.summary: Marks the property or field as the Partition Key for the table.

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.RowKeyAttribute
member.summary: Marks the property or field as the Row Key for the table.

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableAttribute
member.summary: Provide name of the table the data for the class is stored in.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableAttribute.TableName
member.summary: Name of the table

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableAttribute.UseSoftDelete
member.summary: If set, we use soft-delete by setting the IsDeleted flag to true.

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Provides information about the table used to contain the data for an object.

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableColumnAttribute
member.summary: Provide the data table column name the value for this property or field is stored in or retrieved from.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableColumnAttribute.ColumnName
member.summary: Name of the column

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableColumnAttribute.JsonSerialize
member.summary: If set and the Clr type of the class/struct field/property is a complex type, it would be run through a Json (de-)serialization spin.

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableColumnAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Provides information about the table column used to contain the data for an object.

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TimestampAttribute
member.summary: Marks the property or field as the Timestamp value for the table.

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection
member.summary: Represents a connection to an Azure Storage account. This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.PersistSecurityInfo
member.summary: Flag indicating if security information should be made available to callers. Default is FALSE.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.Credential
member.summary: Credential used to establish connection. If PersistSecurityInfo is FALSE, then the Getter will return NULL.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.StorageCredentials
member.summary: Transform the stored credential to a Cosmos SDK storage credential for use with the underlying connection.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.ConnectionString
member.summary: The original connection string used

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.IsUsingDevelopmentStorage
member.summary: Returns if connection is to a Development storage system

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.TableName
member.summary: The table the connection is currently referencing. Will be NULL if has not been used.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.AccountUri
member.summary: Uri to the Table service (CosmosDB has the same scheme)

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.Open(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Open a connection to the specified table
member.param: Name of the table to connect to
Set FALSE to disable use of IsDeleted column

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.Open``1
member.summary: Open a connection to the specified object

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.Close
member.summary: Close the currently open connection

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.ChangeTable(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Change connection to a different table
member.param: Name of table to connect to
Set FALSE to disable use of IsDeleted column

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.ChangeTable``1
member.summary: Change table to the new object

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.CreateCommand
member.summary: Creates a storage tables command instance

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.ExecuteQuery(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.TableQuery{SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity})
member.summary: Execute the query against the open table connection

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.ExecuteAsync(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.TableOperation)
member.summary: Execute the query against the open table connection

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.ExecuteBatchAsync(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.TableBatchOperation)
member.summary: Execute a batch asynchronously

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.ListTables
member.summary: Enumerates all tables in the current storage connection

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.DropTable
member.summary: Drop the current table

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.CreateTable
member.summary: Create the current table

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.CheckTableExists
member.summary: Check if the current table exists

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate the connection with defaults

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate the connection with the provided connection string
member.param: Connection string to use to connect to the Azure Storage

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate the connection using the provided information
member.param: Name of the Azure Storage account to connect to
AccountKey of the Azure Storage account to authenticate to

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose the connection

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageCredential
member.summary: Represents a credential used to connect to Azure Storage

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageCredential.AccountName
member.summary: The AccountName used to connect

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageCredential.AccountSecret
member.summary: The account Secret or Key used to authenticate

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageCredential.#ctor
member.summary: Initialize using defaults (Development storage settings are used)

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageCredential.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initialize using the provided values
member.param: AccountKey or secret used to authenticate

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageCredential.FromConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an instance populated with values found in a connection string

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageCredential.ToString
member.summary: Returns a connectionstring compatible serialization of the values
member.returns: String containing the AccountName and Secret

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand
member.summary: The class that provides all the functionality to interact with Azure Storage Table service.

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.Connection
member.summary: Reference to the Azure Storage Connection class

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.UsesIsDeleted
member.summary: Set this to FALSE to indicate that this table does NOT have an IsDeleted column. If this is set and the table does not have the field, then SELECT queries will FAIL.

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ExecuteQuery(SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query)
member.summary: Execute a query that returns data from the Azure Storage Table

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ExecuteQuery``1(SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query)
member.summary: Execute a query that returns data from the Azure Storage Table

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ExecuteNonQuery``1(SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Crud{``0})
member.summary: Execute a CRUD operation
member.param: The operation to execute (as an SDK Crud operation)

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ExecuteNonQuery(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.TableBatchOperation)
member.summary: Execute a CRUD operation
member.param: The operation to execute (as Azure TableBatchOperation)

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ExecuteNonQuery(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.TableOperation)
member.summary: Execute a CRUD operation
member.param: The operation to execute (as Azure TableOperation)

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ListTables
member.summary: Returns a list of tables
member.returns: IEnumerable of names of the tables present

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.Drop
member.summary: Drops the current table

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.Create
member.summary: Creates the table if it does not exist

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.Exists
member.summary: Returns if the current table exists

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ClearPartition(System.String)
member.summary: Clear all data for a particular PartitionKey value
member.param: The PartitionKey to clear data for

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.ClearTable
member.summary: Delete all the rows from the table

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose the datasource. Does not do anything, this is only so that we can use this class in a 'using' statement like other datasource classes

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageTablesCommand.#ctor(SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.AzureStorageConnection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes using the provided connection
member.param: Set this to FALSE to indicate that this table does NOT have an IsDeleted column.

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Crud`1
member.summary: Defines a CRUD (Create, Replace, Update, Delete) operation on the Azure Storage Table

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Crud`1.CommandType
member.summary: Type of operation to perform

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Crud`1.UseBatches
member.summary: If set, and data contains more than one element then use TableBatchOperation to execute optimally

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Crud`1.Data
member.summary: Data to set in the Azure Table Storage

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Crud`1.#ctor(SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Initialize
member.param: Data to set in the Azure Table Storage

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType
member.summary: Type of CRUD operation to be performed

member.name: F:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown operation

member.name: F:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType.Insert
member.summary: Insert new rows

member.name: F:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType.Update
member.summary: Update existing rows

member.name: F:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType.InsertOrMerge
member.summary: Insert or update rows

member.name: F:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType.InsertOrReplace
member.summary: Insert or Replace rows

member.name: F:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType.Replace
member.summary: Replace rows

member.name: F:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.OperationType.Delete
member.summary: Delete existing rows

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query
member.summary: Supports querying data from the Azure Storage Table service

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.PartitionKey
member.summary: Partition Key to query by

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.RowKey
member.summary: Row Key to query by

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.ODataFilterString
member.summary: The OData Where clause

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.Columns
member.summary: List of columns to fetch

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.OrderBy
member.summary: Name of column to order by

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.IsOrderByDescending
member.summary: If OrderBy is in descending order. Default: FALSE

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.Count
member.summary: Number of records to fetch. Value of -1 or zero will fetch all rows. If for some reason you need to fetch more than int.MaxValue rows, just use -1 eh?

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.UsesIsDeleted
member.summary: True (default) if Table uses the IsDeleted column

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialize the structure
member.param: TRUE if table uses the IsDeleted column to track soft-deletes

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Commands.Query.ToQuery
member.summary: Returns the equivalent TableQuery
member.returns: TableQuery to use with the ExecuteQuery call

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity
member.summary: A TableEntity implementation that avoids us having to write TableEntity classes for every business object we have in the system!

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.PartitionKey
member.summary: The partition key

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.RowKey
member.summary: The row key

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.Timestamp
member.summary: The LastModified timestamp of the row

member.name: P:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.ETag
member.summary: The E-Tag value of the row. Set to "*" to perform a blind update

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.AddOrUpdateProperty(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds or updates a property. If property already exists, updates the value. Otherwise adds a new property.

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.GetPropertyValue(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the value of the specified property
member.param: Value to return if the property does not exist

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.#ctor
member.summary: Blank constructor, used by the rehydrator

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.From``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a table entity from a business object
member.param: If TRUE, only the partition and row key data is extracted. We don't waste cycles populating other properties
member.typeparam: Type of the business object instance

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.ReadEntity(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.EntityProperty},Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.OperationContext)
member.summary: Rehydrate the table entity from storage
member.param: The extra properties read from the Azure table storage
OperationContext, not used by this method

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.WriteEntity(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Table.OperationContext)
member.summary: Persist the table entity to storage
member.param: OperationContext, not used by this method

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.To``1
member.summary: Convert the current Table Entity object into the provided business object
member.typeparam: Type of the business object instance
member.returns: Business object instance -- NULL if current entity is not properly populated.

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.ToList``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity})
member.summary: Converts the provided list of table entity records to a list of business objects
member.typeparam: Type of the business object instance
member.returns: List of business objects. An empty list if records were empty

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.ImportValues(SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity)
member.summary: Overwrites existing properties with values from the . Properties that do not exist in are not touched.
member.param: The entity to copy values from

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.GetAcceptableValue(System.Type,System.Type,System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a value that matches the destination type

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.CosmosDB.TableEntity.IsTableKeyValidFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the proposedValue is valid as a partition/row key
member.returns: True if value can be used

member.name: T:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.Helpers.Edm
member.summary: Converts data between Edm (Azure Table) types to .Net types

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.Helpers.Edm.NeedsConversion(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Returns if the value needs to be converted between the two types
member.param: The data type in Azure Table
member.returns: True if type needs to be converted

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.Helpers.Edm.ConvertTo(System.Type,System.Object)
member.summary: Convert between types

member.name: M:SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Internal.Helpers.Edm.IsEdmCompatibleType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if the provided type is compatible with Edm data types

member.name: T:Internal.Reflection.Class
member.summary: Metadata about a class.

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.Name
member.summary: Name of the class

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.TableAttribute
member.summary: The Table attribute

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.HasPartitionKey
member.summary: Get/set if the class has a PartitionKey defined

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.HasRowKey
member.summary: Get/set if the class has a RowKey defined

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.HasETag
member.summary: Get/set if the class has a ETag property defined

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.HasTimestamp
member.summary: Get/set if the class has a Timestamp defined

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.Properties
member.summary: A readonly list of the properties

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.Fields
member.summary: A readonly list of the fields

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.Class.Members
member.summary: A readonly list of both properties and fields

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.Class.#ctor(System.String,SujaySarma.Data.Azure.Tables.Attributes.TableAttribute,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Internal.Reflection.MemberProperty},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Internal.Reflection.MemberField})
member.summary: Initialize the structure for an object
member.param: A readonly list of the properties in this object
A readonly list of fields in this object

member.name: T:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase
member.summary: Base class implementing functionality common to class fields and properties

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.Name
member.summary: Name of the member

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.CanWrite
member.summary: Flag indicating if the member can be written (has a Setter)

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.Type
member.summary: Data Type of the member

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.IsEdmType
member.summary: If true, the Type is supported by Edm

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.IsNullableType
member.summary: If true, the CLR type allows NULLs

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.IsPartitionKey
member.summary: Maps to the TableEntity's PartitionKey

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.IsRowKey
member.summary: Maps to the TableEntity's RowKey

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.IsETag
member.summary: Maps to the TableEntity's ETag property

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.IsTimestamp
member.summary: Maps to the TableEntity's Timestamp property

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.TableEntityColumn
member.summary: If mapped to a TableEntity's fields, reference to the TableColumnAttribute for that. (Could be NULL)

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.#ctor(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Initialize the structure

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.#ctor(System.Reflection.FieldInfo)
member.summary: Initialize the structure

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.CommonInit(System.Reflection.MemberInfo,System.Type)
member.summary: Common initialization

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.Read``1(``0)
member.summary: Read the value from the property/field and return it
member.typeparam: Data type of the object to read the property/field of
member.param: The object instance to read the value from

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.Write``1(``0,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes the provided value to the property/field of the object instance
member.typeparam: Data type of the object to read the property/field of
member.param: The object instance to write the value to

member.name: F:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.FLAGS_READ_WRITE
member.summary: Binding flags for read and write of properties/fields

member.name: F:Internal.Reflection.MemberBase.FixedColumnNames
member.summary: Names of columns that are fixed in Azure Tables

member.name: T:Internal.Reflection.MemberField
member.summary: Contains metadata about a discovered interesting class Field

member.name: F:Internal.Reflection.MemberField._field
member.summary: There are no Get/set methods for the field. Reflection performs dirty unsafe tricks to read and write values, using internal-only methods. The best way not to corrupt the heap/stack is to cache the FieldInfo.

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberField.#ctor(System.Reflection.FieldInfo)
member.summary: Initialize the structure for a field

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberField.Read``1(``0)
member.summary: Read the value from the field and return it
member.typeparam: Data type of the object to read the field of
member.param: The object instance to read the value from

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberField.Write``1(``0,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes the provided value to the object instance
member.typeparam: Data type of the object to read the property or field of
member.param: The object instance to write the value to

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberProperty.CanRead
member.summary: Flag indicating if the member can be read (has a Getter)

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberProperty.GetMethod
member.summary: The MethodInfo for the member's GET accessor

member.name: P:Internal.Reflection.MemberProperty.SetMethod
member.summary: The MethodInfo for the member's SET accessor

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberProperty.#ctor(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Initialize the structure for a Property

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberProperty.Read``1(``0)
member.summary: Read the value from the property or field and return it
member.typeparam: Data type of the object to read the property or field of
member.param: The object instance to read the value from

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.MemberProperty.Write``1(``0,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes the provided value to the object instance - WITHOUT type conversion.
member.typeparam: Data type of the object to read the property/field of
member.param: The object instance to write the value to

member.name: T:Internal.Reflection.ReflectionCache
member.summary: A classes inspected and cached by hte Type inspection engine

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.ReflectionCache.TrySet(Internal.Reflection.Class,System.String)
member.summary: Add an item to cache if it is not already in it
member.param: The key name of the object

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.ReflectionCache.TryGet(System.String)
member.summary: Fetch an item from cache

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.Reflector.InspectForAzureTables``1
member.summary: Inspect a class for Azure Tables
member.typeparam: Type of business class to be stored into Azure Tables

member.name: M:Internal.Reflection.Reflector.InspectForAzureTables(System.Type)
member.summary: Inspect a class for Azure Tables
member.param: Type of business class to be stored into Azure Tables
